goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west' and should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'north' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'star of the hotel', and 'postcode'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'attraction' by '10:00'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west and should be in the type of college
Make sure you get address and phone number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse
Make sure you get address, star of the hotel, and postcode
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the attraction by 10:00
Make sure you get contact number and car type
